description: ol-reserved-word (issue #427, M4 audit): `struct grid [ x ]` redefines `grid`, a Geometry overlay primitive (spec/geometry-module.md's `## grid`). The static checker flags the struct type name at its own span with `namespace: "primitive"`, gated on the active `geometry` profile — the static counterpart to the runtime fixture `data/struct-runtime/struct-reserved-word-geometry-grid`.
